• Procedural mining world with tile‑based map, ores, and upgrades.
  • Multiplayer via MQTT with host election, chat, trading, and admin tools.
  • Custom UI: bevel borders, HUD gauges, minimap, modals, mobile‑control layout.
    Game.init()
    Shop.buy('drill')

This HTML creates a pixel‑styled mining game where players move, drill, build, and trade in a shared world. The script handles map generation, player physics, networking, UI rendering (HUD gauges, minimap, modals), and a shop system for upgrades and consumables. Mobile controls, custom textures, and a custom modal system are also provided.
